title: Web3 & Metaverse Fundamentals
description: Build a strong foundation in Web3, crypto, and security essentials.

subsections.title: How blocks are linked and validated

overview: This course introduces you to the core concepts behind Web3, blockchain, and the metaverse. You'll learn how blockchain technology works, what makes crypto different from traditional money, and how decentralized applications are changing the internet.
learningObjectives: Understand the fundamentals of blockchain technology and how it works
Navigate the crypto landscape including wallets, tokens, and gas fees
Grasp the essentials of DeFi, Web3, and the evolving metaverse

title: Setting Up and Securing Your Wallet
description: Learn to create, manage, and protect your cryptocurrency wallets.
overview: Your crypto wallet is the most important tool in Web3. This course teaches you how to choose the right wallet, set it up securely, and protect your assets from common threats.
learningObjectives: Choose between hot and cold wallets based on your needs
Set up and configure a MetaMask wallet
Implement security best practices to protect your private keys

title: Naira-to-Crypto Trading Basics
description: Understand how to buy and sell crypto using Nigerian Naira on peer-to-peer platforms.
overview: Learn the fundamentals of buying and selling crypto with Naira through WhatsApp-based OTC platforms and P2P exchanges.

title: How to Read a Candlestick Chart
description: Learn to read and interpret candlestick charts for smarter trading decisions.
overview: Candlestick charts are the language of trading. This course teaches you to read price action, identify patterns, and make informed decisions based on chart data.
learningObjectives: Combine chart analysis with trading strategy

title: Spot vs Futures Trading
description: Understand the key differences between spot and futures trading and when to use each.
overview: This course breaks down the differences between buying crypto on the spot market versus trading futures contracts, including leverage, margin, and risk management.
learningObjectives: Differentiate between spot and futures markets
Apply risk management techniques to each trading style

title: Identifying Promising Projects Early
description: Explore deeper participation, analysis, and onchain opportunities in the Web3 ecosystem.
overview: Learn the frameworks and tools experienced crypto analysts use to evaluate early-stage projects, assess tokenomics, and identify investment opportunities before the crowd.
learningObjectives: Evaluate project fundamentals: team, tokenomics, roadmap
Use on-chain data to spot emerging trends
